name: Bob's Indoor Golf & Games
about: Bob's Indoor Golf & Games is an indoor golf facility that provides a simulated golfing experience. The venue offers golfers the opportunity to play and practice in a controlled environment. The specific technology and amenities available are not detailed on the website.
why_golfers_like_it: Available for private events and group bookings
Offers a simulated environment for practice and play
